prompt: Design an illuminated manuscript element for 'Ars Magna'. The initial 'A' should be ornate and golden, followed by gothic script with red flourishes, all set on a textured parchment.
prompt_refined: Generate an illuminated manuscript element. It features a prominent, ornate, golden initial letter 'A' positioned on the left. To its right, a section of elegant gothic script unfurls, adorned with intricate red flourishes throughout its lettering and margins. The entire design rests on a detailed, textured parchment background.
objects: prominent, ornate, golden initial letter 'A' (on the left)
elegant gothic script section (to the right of the letter 'A')
intricate red flourishes (throughout gothic script lettering and margins)
